author: Rook
summary: Implemented core systems for Context Heatmaps, Vitals Monitoring, Incident Alarms, and the Command Center panel into the frontend.
decisions: Integrated dynamic agent rendering with 'Context Glow' heatmap effects.
Added fixed 'Vitals Tiles' to the UI for real-time CPU/RAM/Disk monitoring.
Added a 'Command Center' side panel for direct tool execution from the 2D view.
Established a 'Podium' element for daily board meeting audio briefings.
Created a CSS-based 'Incident Alarm' system to highlight tool failures.
next_steps: Connect the Vitals system to the actual /status backend endpoint.
Map specific agent context levels to the glow intensity.
